default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://res.cloudinary.com https:; media-src 'self' https://res.cloudinary.com; connect-src 'self' https://service.emailjs.com https://api.emailjs.com https://wa.me; frame-src 'self' https://open.spotify.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self' https://wa.me; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'
